steps.title: Compute the upper bounds
steps.content:
For each row, $y$ must be less than $5x+6$. The choices use $x=3$, $x=5$, and $x=7$:

$$5(3)+6=21$$
$$5(5)+6=31$$
$$5(7)+6=41$$

steps.title: Test the matching table
steps.content:
The table with $y$-values $17$, $27$, and $37$ satisfies each bound:

$$17<21$$
$$27<31$$
$$37<41$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Enter the table values and compare them with $5x+6$ row by row. The answer is A.
